videos.headline: Georgia Tech kicks game-winning FG to spark wild celebrations
videos.description: Georgia Tech races its kicker onto the field, and Aidan Birr nails a 55-yard field goal to take down Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech kicks game-winning FG to spark wild celebrations) 2025/09/13 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Aidan Birr kicks 40-yard field goal) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Georgia Tech takes a 10-0 lead as Jamal Haynes finds the end zone for a short touchdown.

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik leaps into end zone for Clemson TD
videos.description: Clemson gets their first touchdown as Cade Klubnik reaches the ball over the line for a short score.

videos.headline: Klubnik throws costly INT in the red zone
videos.description: Georgia Tech's Omar Daniels times his jump perfectly and picks off Cade Klubnik in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Klubnik throws costly INT in the red zone) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryant Wesco Jr. flies downfield for a long Clemson TD
